case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. MADISON MISSINNE ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MISSINNE, MADISON DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-01-2021
PROOF OF NON-SERVICE (DECLARATION RE: DILIGENCE) FOR DEFENDANT MADISON MISSINNE (TRANSACTION ID # 200025441) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-27-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION IN RESPONSE TO THE COURTS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 100135809) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK
DECLARATION OF SCOTT D DYLE IN RESPONSE TO THE COURTS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 100143964) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-27-2021 CONTINUED TO OCT-26-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100143032)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-26-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
